title: Home Screen - Update Available - Both earbuds are connected
scenario: Home Screen hides Software and Available update fields after tapping Status Box when update is available on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds are powered on and paired/connected to the phone.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the Home screen Status Box.
expected: Step 3: Status Box shows "Left", "Right", and "Case" battery levels, a "Status" field with "connected" status and green indicator, a "Software" field showing current version with red indicator, and an "Available" field showing the available update version. The device image shows left and right earbuds. Step 4: "Software" and "Available" fields are no longer visible.
